articles.title: 28 April 1996: Milan beat Fiorentina 3-1 and won their 15th scudetto
articles.summary: As reported by the Lega Calcio Serie A website, on 28 April 1996 Milan won their 15th Italian title, beating Fiorentina 3-1 at San Siro on the third last matchday and increasing their lead over Juventus, the first pursuers, to +9.
